title: Immersive MC
description: Immerse yourself with your Minecraft world!
body:
Immerse yourself with the world!
Enjoy better combat, FPS, graphics and more!
You can look down and see your own body!
Better animations!
Host your world with an Open to LAN IP address!
Crawl without trapdoors!
Have a chance to do a flip when falling!
Better Elytras!
Walk through leaves!
Shader Support!
